info.name: HubNepa API — FINAL 274 Routes (Production)
info.description:
FINAL complete collection — all 274 live routes on https://hubnepa-backend.onrender.com

QUICK START:
1. Import this collection
2. Run folder '01-Auth' top to bottom — tokens auto-save
3. All other folders work immediately after that

PRODUCTION URL: https://hubnepa-backend.onrender.com/api/v1
